free_text: Deuterons interaction with nuclei 208-Pb at sub-barrier
Thick (11 mg/cm2) self-support 208Pb target was used.
Deuteron beam intensity was controlled with Faraday cup
and two monitor detectors, which were installed in the
reaction chamber at the fixed angles 27 and 150 degree.
ANG is angle between incident deuteron beam and D
ANG is angle between incident deuteron beam and D
elastic scattering were determined by integrating of
energy spectra over the observed peaks and normalizing
the cross section values, measured at forward angles,
to the cross section of Rutherford scattering.
